scenario.context: Station 08 of the day run: evaluate the project result and reflect on project execution.
scenario.mission: You create an actual-versus-target comparison, analyze causes, and derive concrete improvements for follow-up projects.

constraints: Carry out target-versus-actual analysis based on facts
Prioritize improvements in a binding way

customerRequest.subject: Station 08: Final evaluation and reflection
customerRequest.body: Please create a final evaluation for the customer project with a target-versus-actual picture, root-cause analysis, and a concrete improvement plan.

questions.title: Build the target-versus-actual picture
questions.prompt: Which elements belong in a robust final evaluation? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Assess deviations together with their cause
Name the impact on schedule, cost, and quality

feedback.correct: Correct: This forms a robust final picture.
feedback.wrong: Partly wrong: Please secure the links to goals, deviations, and impact more clearly.

questions.title: Prioritize cause analysis
questions.prompt: Which approach is best suited for the cause analysis?

options.text: Connect deviation, assumed main cause, and corrective measure in a structured way
Blame all causes on time pressure across the board

feedback.correct: Correct: Cause and measure have to be considered together.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: Reflection needs real root-cause work.

questions.title: Lessons learned process
questions.prompt: Put the flow for robust lessons learned in order.

feedback.correct: Correct: The learning process is clear and actionable.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please move from target-versus-actual via causes to implementation.

questions.title: Goal achievement rate
questions.prompt: Out of 20 agreed project goals, 17 were fully achieved. What is the goal achievement rate in percent?

feedback.wrong: Please calculate the share of achieved goals correctly.

questions.title: Project close note
questions.prompt: Formulate a close note in 4-6 sentences with goal achievement, the main cause of one deviation, and the next improvement.
questions.expectedOutline: Clear final picture with cause and a concrete improvement lever.

feedback.correct: Correct: The close note is reflective and close to implementation.
feedback.wrong: Please formulate goal achievement, cause, and improvement more explicitly.
